feeTier.note: Entry/lowest-volume tier (taker 0.26%, maker 0.16%) as of this commit. Fill model is market fill at open[t+1] per the kernel's execution-delay rule, so SimConfig calibration in 10B uses the TAKER rate. Update if the real account's actual 30-day volume tier differs.

_lockNote: Binding per docs/PRE_REGISTRATION_POLICY.md §5 — exchange/pair/resolution are pre-registered config, not outcome-tuned. Testing additional resolutions (1d, 4h) is a new committed search and must be logged in the preregistration ledger, not a silent edit to this file.
